services.description: Each vertical is a standalone SaaS — but they share auth, billing, compliance, and 32 MCP servers across all trades — UK + EU + US + AU + CA + air + sea + rail. Pick one. Bolt on the others when you're ready.

equipment.description: Each MCP is a tiny, focused server — install via pip, call from Claude or any MCP-aware agent, get signed attestations back. All MIT-licensed, all on PyPI.
equipment.bundle_note: Want all nine + the SaaS umbrella? Pro tier bundles them.

about.intro: Nine real UK trade markets — plant hire, grab hire, muckaway, car transport, crane hire, hiab, general haulage, rail freight, livestock welfare — wrapped in one platform with shared auth, shared billing, and shared compliance. Underneath it: 32 PyPI-published MCP servers, each focused on one regulator + the governance bridge.
about.problem_description: Every UK trade business has the same compliance loop: DVSA, tachograph audit, CHAS prep, CPCS, ISO 19650 BIM, waste-carrier registration. None of it is hard. All of it is buried in PDFs and £2k consultancy fees. Haulage.app turns each regulator into a callable tool.
about.value_compliance_description: Every MCP returns a signed attestation through meok-attestation-api. Your audit trail is automatic.
about.value_open_description: MIT-licensed servers on PyPI. Fork them, run them locally, embed them in your own SaaS.
about.value_operator_description: MEOK AI Labs is a solo founder shop in London. No agency markup, no sales engineers, no upsells.
about.value_eu_act_description: Aligned with the EU AI Act + UK AI Bill draft. Risk classifiers and FRIA generators ship in the catalogue.
about.trade_muckaway_blurb: AI spoil classification, weighbridge OCR, Stripe checkout. 60 pages, 116 components.
about.trade_planthire_blurb: Equipment booking, ISO 19650, CHAS, CPCS, LOLER — all baked in.
about.trade_grabhire_blurb: Instant quoting, DVSA roadside, waste-carrier checks. WhatsApp + phone CTAs.
about.try_description: Pro tier unlocks all 32 MCPs and access to the trade SaaS apps for £79/mo. No contracts.

mcps_page.description_part_1: Each server is single-purpose, MIT-licensed, and published to PyPI. Call any tool from Claude Desktop, an Agent SDK app, or curl. Every response can be signed by
mcps_page.description_part_2: so you have an audit trail.

quickstart.seo_description: Install your first MEOK trade-compliance MCP server in 5 minutes. Configure Claude Desktop, make your first signed compliance attestation, verify against the public API.
quickstart.intro_part_2: (UK DVSA tachograph + OCRS), configures Claude Desktop, runs your first signed compliance check, and verifies the signature against the public attestation API.
quickstart.step_1_desc: Any Python ≥ 3.10. We recommend a fresh virtualenv.
quickstart.step_2_post: Restart Claude Desktop. The tools appear in the right-hand sidebar.
quickstart.step_3_desc: Ask Claude in plain English. The tool fires automatically.
quickstart.step_4_desc: Anyone (auditor, regulator, customer) can independently verify the signature against the public attestation API:
quickstart.step_4_post_suffix: if the chain is intact. Use this in your audit packs.
quickstart.next_step_governance_note: — auto-bridge every attestation to EU AI Act + UK AI Bill.

trust.seo_title: Trust & Security | Haulage.app | MEOK AI Labs
trust.seo_description: How MEOK signs every compliance attestation, why the verifier endpoint is public, and how billing keeps card data off MEOK infrastructure. 32 open source MCPs, EU AI Act bridge, HMAC-SHA256 signing.
trust.intro: Compliance is the product. The same audit chain that gets you to DVSA / FORS / IATA / EU AI Act readiness has to hold up under our own scrutiny first. Here's what that means in practice.
trust.pillar_1_body: Every tool result from every MEOK MCP is signed with HMAC-SHA256 using your organisation's secret. The signature, issuer, version and timestamp are emitted alongside the payload. No exceptions.
trust.pillar_2_body: Anyone — auditor, regulator, customer — can verify a signature without installing a single dependency by POSTing the payload + sig to meok-attestation-api.vercel.app/verify. Pass = chain intact.
trust.pillar_3_body: Card data never touches MEOK's infrastructure. All checkout flows go through Stripe-hosted payment pages with 3DS strong-customer-auth. We hold no PANs, no CVCs, no card tokens.
trust.pillar_4_body: Every published MCP server is open source on PyPI. Read the code before you install it. Build alongside our team. Issues + PRs on github.com/CSOAI-ORG/.
trust.pillar_5_title: EU AI Act + UK AI Bill bridge
trust.pillar_5_body: Compliance attestations from every trade MCP auto-bridge to EU AI Act Annex III, UK AI Bill Article 22c, NIST AI RMF and ISO/IEC 42001 via meok-haulage-governance-bridge-mcp. One install, both sides.
trust.verifier_body: The verifier endpoint is public, rate-limited, and requires no API key. POST a signed payload + signature — get back valid: true|false. That's the whole protocol.
trust.contact_body: Security disclosures, audit-pack requests, sub-processor lists — everything routes to one inbox. Same-day reply guaranteed.
